title: Understanding Position Vectors
text: Position vectors describe the location of an object relative to a reference point. In this problem, the traffic light is the reference point.

title: Direction Matters
text: Remember that west of the traffic light is in the negative $$x$$ direction, while east is in the positive $$x$$ direction.

title: Calculate the Initial Position
text: At $$t=0$$, the car is $$2.0$$ km west of the traffic light. What is the position vector?

title: Calculate the Final Position
text: At $$t=6.0$$ min, the car is $$5.0$$ km east of the traffic light. What is the position vector?

title: Review the Coordinate System
text: Ensure you understand the coordinate system: negative values indicate west, and positive values indicate east.
